'''鈭歬-ng-zh''' ('''kangazha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:monotone|monotone]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-ng-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:monotone|monotone]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歬-ng-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kangazha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:kangazhithi|kangazhithi]] || [[word:kangazhiji|kangazhiji]] || [[word:kangazhishi|kangazhishi]] || [[word:kangazhi|kangazhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:kangazhuthuth|kangazhuthuth]] || [[word:kangazhujuj|kangazhujuj]] || [[word:kangazhushush|kangazhushush]] || [[word:kangazh|kangazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:kangazhuthu|kangazhuthu]] || [[word:kangazhuju|kangazhuju]] || [[word:kangazhushu|kangazhushu]] || [[word:kangazhu|kangazhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:kangazhufuth|kangazhufuth]] || [[word:kangazhufuj|kangazhufuj]] || [[word:kangazhufush|kangazhufush]] || [[word:kangazhuf|kangazhuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:kangazhethe|kangazhethe]] || [[word:kangazheje|kangazheje]] || [[word:kangazheshe|kangazheshe]] || [[word:kangazhe|kangazhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:kangazhothoth|kangazhothoth]] || [[word:kangazhojoj|kangazhojoj]] || [[word:kangazhoshosh|kangazhoshosh]] || [[word:kangazh|kangazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:kangazhotho|kangazhotho]] || [[word:kangazhojo|kangazhojo]] || [[word:kangazhosho|kangazhosho]] || [[word:kangazho|kangazho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:kangazhofoth|kangazhofoth]] || [[word:kangazhofoj|kangazhofoj]] || [[word:kangazhofosh|kangazhofosh]] || [[word:kangazhof|kangazhof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:kangazh忙th忙|kangazh忙th忙]] || [[word:kangazh忙j忙|kangazh忙j忙]] || [[word:kangazh忙sh忙|kangazh忙sh忙]] || [[word:kangazh忙|kangazh忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:kangazhathath|kangazhathath]] || [[word:kangazhajaj|kangazhajaj]] || [[word:kangazhashash|kangazhashash]] || [[word:kangazh|kangazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:kangazhatha|kangazhatha]] || [[word:kangazhaja|kangazhaja]] || [[word:kangazhasha|kangazhasha]] || [[word:kangazha|kangazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:kangazhafath|kangazhafath]] || [[word:kangazhafaj|kangazhafaj]] || [[word:kangazhafash|kangazhafash]] || [[word:kangazhaf|kangazhaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:kangazhasha|kangazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gokangazhasha|gokangazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokikangazhasha|gokikangazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:kangazhn眉sha|kangazhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokangazhnkn眉sha|gokangazhnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokikangazhn眉sha|gokikangazhn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kangazhsh毛sha|kangazhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokangazhnksh毛sha|gokangazhnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikangazhsh毛sha|gokikangazhsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:kangazhrosha|kangazhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokangazhnkrosha|gokangazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikangazhrosha|gokikangazhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:kangazhmusha|kangazhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokangazhnkmusha|gokangazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikangazhmusha|gokikangazhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:kangazhsherasha|kangazhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokangazhnksherasha|gokangazhnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokikangazhsherasha|gokikangazhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:kangazhngasha|kangazhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokangazhnkngasha|gokangazhnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokikangazhngasha|gokikangazhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:kangazhyasha|kangazhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokangazhnkyasha|gokangazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokikangazhyasha|gokikangazhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:kangazhyamasha|kangazhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokangazhnkyamasha|gokangazhnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokikangazhyamasha|gokikangazhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:kangazhn眉sh毛sha|kangazhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokangazhnkn眉sh毛sha|gokangazhnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikangazhn眉sh毛sha|gokikangazhn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kangazhn眉rosha|kangazhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokangazhnkn眉rosha|gokangazhnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikangazhn眉rosha|gokikangazhn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kangazhn眉musha|kangazhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokangazhnkn眉musha|gokangazhnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikangazhn眉musha|gokikangazhn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:kangazhsh毛n眉sha|kangazhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokangazhnksh毛n眉sha|gokangazhnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikangazhsh毛n眉sha|gokikangazhsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kangazhsh毛rosha|kangazhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokangazhnksh毛rosha|gokangazhnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikangazhsh毛rosha|gokikangazhsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kangazhsh毛musha|kangazhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokangazhnksh毛musha|gokangazhnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikangazhsh毛musha|gokikangazhsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:kangazhron眉sha|kangazhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokangazhnkron眉sha|gokangazhnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikangazhron眉sha|gokikangazhron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:kangazhrosh毛sha|kangazhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokangazhnkrosh毛sha|gokangazhnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikangazhrosh毛sha|gokikangazhrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kangazhromusha|kangazhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokangazhnkromusha|gokangazhnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikangazhromusha|gokikangazhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:kangazhmun眉sha|kangazhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokangazhnkmun眉sha|gokangazhnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokikangazhmun眉sha|gokikangazhmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:kangazhmush毛sha|kangazhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokangazhnkmush毛sha|gokangazhnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokikangazhmush毛sha|gokikangazhmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:kangazhmurosha|kangazhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokangazhnkmurosha|gokangazhnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokikangazhmurosha|gokikangazhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:kangazh|kangazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:k忙ng忙zh|k忙ng忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hokangazh|hokangazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hok忙ng忙zh|hok忙ng忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohokangazh|hohokangazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohok忙ng忙zh|hohok忙ng忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉kangazh|n眉kangazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉k忙ng忙zh|n眉k忙ng忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉kangazh|n眉n眉kangazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉k忙ng忙zh|n眉n眉k忙ng忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂kangazh|n茂kangazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂k忙ng忙zh|n茂k忙ng忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂kangazh|n茂n茂kangazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂k忙ng忙zh|n茂n茂k忙ng忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lukangazh|lukangazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luk忙ng忙zh|luk忙ng忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulukangazh|lulukangazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluk忙ng忙zh|luluk忙ng忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:likangazh|likangazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lik忙ng忙zh|lik忙ng忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilikangazh|lilikangazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilik忙ng忙zh|lilik忙ng忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kokangazh|kokangazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kok忙ng忙zh|kok忙ng忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokokangazh|kokokangazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokok忙ng忙zh|kokok忙ng忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kekangazh|kekangazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kek忙ng忙zh|kek忙ng忙zh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekekangazh|kekekangazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekek忙ng忙zh|kekek忙ng忙zh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
